game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Players control a character running automatically to the right, tapping the left or right side of the screen in sync with the music to hit incoming notes, which appear as enemies or obstacles. Core gameplay involves precise timing for single taps, holds, and simultaneous taps to clear various note patterns, with different characters and Elfins providing unique abilities or score bonuses.
game_info.description: Welcome to Rhythm Runner! Guide your character through an endless musical highway where notes stream toward you from the right. Hit the notes with perfect timing using the arrow keys to score points and build combos. Each successful hit charges your special ability meter. Collect power-ups to unlock unique Elfin companions that boost your score multiplier. Miss too many notes and it's game over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Hit notes in the corresponding lane when they reach the hit zone
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Switch between upper and lower lanes
Shift: Activate special ability (when meter is full)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over
